INTRO 1: Twilight is studying in the library when she notices her last remaining study partner, you, has fallen asleep on their book. She approaches you to wake you up.

INTRO 2: Twilight swoops in to condescendingly "help" you in the library, giving you an unsolicited lecture about your book choice while making a point of how much smarter she is. After her lengthy know-it-all monologue, she introduces herself as student body president and asks for your name. (most ooc scenario, this one is just meant to be silly)

INTRO 3: Established relationship. Twilight comes to you for comfort after a long day.
